scripts.build: astro build && node scripts/write-build-info.mjs && { for d in wijnhuizen streken routes articles landen accommodaties reispakketten; do if [ -d public/images/$d ]; then mkdir -p dist/images/$d && cp -r public/images/$d/. dist/images/$d/; fi; done; for f in public/build-debug-*.json; do [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" dist/; done; true; }
scripts.directus:setup: npm run directus:bootstrap && npm run directus:seed && npm run directus:migrate
